name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
Dreamy Purple in stock!!️
Original leather with sheepskin lining Classic Lady Diana Bag, a must-have three-compartment mini bag for everyone😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, can be worn crossbody or handheld for a feminine look. A classic fashion style. A bag that many fashion icons and on Instagram have, don't miss it❤️
size:17*7*15cm
